summary: Tested PlayXBets bet settlement and datetime fix. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Admin Bet Settlement page loads correctly with pending settlements and declare winner buttons. Datetime comparison errors no longer occurring after backend restart.

minor.issue: Rate limited - 'Blocked for 15 minutes' (expected, not a bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bet settlement and datetime fix verified. Key findings: (1) ensure_utc() helper correctly normalizes datetime values, (2) No datetime comparison errors after backend restart, (3) Bet Settlement page shows 2 matches with unsettled bets, (4) Lay bet liability calculation correct: stake*(odds-1), (5) Back bet deducts full stake, (6) CricketData API rate-limited but Odds API working fine with 7 cricket events.

matches_with_odds.details: GET /api/matches returns 27 matches, several with real odds from Odds API (e.g., KKR vs MI: 2.66/1.6)

no_minor_leagues.details: No Plunket Shield, Sheffield Shield, or Ranji Trophy matches in response

admin_pending_settlements.details: GET /api/admin/settlement/pending returns matches with unsettled bets (requires auth)

lay_bet_liability.details: POST /api/bets correctly calculates lay bet liability as stake*(odds-1)

back_bet_deduction.details: POST /api/bets correctly deducts full stake for back bets

datetime_fix.details: No 'can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes' errors after backend restart

admin_bet_settlement_page.details: Page loads with 'Matches with Unsettled Bets' section and 'All Active Matches' section

sidebar_renamed.details: Admin sidebar shows 'Bet Settlement' link (renamed from 'Declare Outcomes')

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/admin_bet_settlement_page.png - Admin Bet Settlement page with pending settlements
